commonAbilities.name: Petrifying Gaze
commonAbilities.desc:
If a creature 星辰ts its turn within ??? ft. of the [MON] and the two of them can see each other, the [MON] can f兽人e the creature to make a DC ??? 体质 豁免 if the [MON] isn't 失能. On a failed save, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is 束缚. It must repeat the 豁免 at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is 石化 until freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic.
A creature that isn't 措手不及 can avert its eyes to a虚空 the 豁免 at the 星辰t of its turn. If it does so, it 看不见 the [MON] until the 星辰t of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If it looks at the [MON] in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.
If the [MON] sees its reflection within ??? ft. of it in bright light, it is affected by its own gaze.

commonAbilities.name: Pounce
commonAbilities.desc: If the [MON] moves at least ??? ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ??? attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra [???D???] ??? 伤害. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC ??? 力量 豁免 or be knocked 倒地. If the target is 倒地, the [MON] can make another ??? attack against it as a 附赠动作.

commonAbilities.name: 横行
commonAbilities.desc: When the [MON] reduces a creature to 0 生命值 with a 近战 attack on its turn, the [MON] can take a 附赠动作 to move up to half its 速度 and make a ??? attack.

commonAbilities.name: Reactive
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can take one 反应 on every turn in 战斗.

commonAbilities.name: Read Thoughts (Action)
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] magically reads the surface thoughts of one creature within ??? ft. of it. The effect can penetrate barriers, but 3 ft. of wood or dirt, 2 ft. of stone, 2 inches of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks it. While the target is in range, the [MON] can continue reading its thoughts, as long as the [MON]'s 专注 isn't broken (as if concentrating on a spell). While reading the target's mind, the [MON] has 优势 on 感知 (洞悉) and 魅力 (欺瞒, 威吓, and 游说) checks against the target.

commonAbilities.name: Reckless
commonAbilities.desc: At the 星辰t of its turn, the [MON] can gain 优势 on all 近战武器攻击 rolls it makes during that turn, but 攻击检定s against it have 优势 until the 星辰t of its next turn.

commonAbilities.name: Regeneration
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] regains ??? 生命值 at the 星辰t of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point.

commonAbilities.name: Regeneration (Troll)
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] regains ??? 生命值 at the 星辰t of its turn. If the [MON] takes acid or fire 伤害, this trait doesn't function at the 星辰t of the [MON]'s next turn. The [MON] dies only if it 星辰ts its turn with 0 生命值 and doesn't regenerate.

commonAbilities.name: Relentless
commonAbilities.realname: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
commonAbilities.desc: If the [MON] takes ??? 伤害 or less that would reduce it to 0 生命值, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.

commonAbilities.name: Rust Metal
commonAbilities.desc: Any nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits the [MON] corrodes. After dealing 伤害, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to 伤害 rolls. If its penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Non magical ammunition made of metal that hits the [MON] is destroyed after dealing 伤害.

commonAbilities.name: 凶蛮攻击
commonAbilities.desc: When the [MON] scores a critical hit with a 近战武器攻击, it can roll one of the weapon’s 伤害 dice one additional time and add it to the extra 伤害 of the critical hit.

commonAbilities.name: Sense Magic
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] 感官 magic within 120 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn't its精灵 magical.

commonAbilities.name: Shadow 隐匿
commonAbilities.desc: While in dim light or 黑暗, the [MON] can take the 皮甲 action as a 附赠动作.

commonAbilities.name: 变形生物
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can use its action to polymorph into a ???, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its 体型, are the same in each form. Any 装备 it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

commonAbilities.name: 变形生物 (Lycanthrope)
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can use its action to polymorph into a ???-类人生物 hybrid or into a ???, or back into its true form, which is 类人生物. Its statistics, other than its AC, are the same in each form. Any 装备 it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

commonAbilities.name: Shielded Mind
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] is 免疫 to scrying and to any effect that would sense its emotions, read its thoughts, or detect its location.

commonAbilities.name: Siege Monster
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] deals double 伤害 to objects and structures.

commonAbilities.name: Sneak Attack
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] deals an extra [???D???] 伤害 when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has 优势 on the 攻击检定, or when the target is within 5 ft. of an ally of the [MON] that isn't 失能 and the [MON] doesn't have 劣势 on the 攻击检定.

commonAbilities.name: Speak With Plants and Beasts
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a 语言.

commonAbilities.name: 蛛行术
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an 属性检定.

commonAbilities.name: Split (反应)
commonAbilities.desc: When a [MON] that is 中型 or 大型r is subjected to 闪电 or 挥砍 伤害, it splits into two new [MON] if it has at least 10 生命值. Each new [MON] has 生命值 equal to half the original [MON]'s, rounded down. New [MON] are one 体型 小型er than the original [MON].

commonAbilities.name: 立定跳远
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON]'s long jump is up to ??? ft. and its high jump is up to ??? ft., with or without a running 星辰t.

commonAbilities.name: Steadfast
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can't be 恐慌 while it can see an allied creature within 30 feet of it.

commonAbilities.name: 日照敏感
commonAbilities.desc: While in 太阳light, the [MON] has 劣势 on 攻击检定s, as well as on 感知 (察觉) checks that rely on sight.

commonAbilities.name: Sure-Footed
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] has 优势 on 力量 and 敏捷 豁免 made against effects that would knock it 倒地.

commonAbilities.name: 突袭攻击
commonAbilities.desc: If the [MON] 出其不意s a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of 战斗, the target takes an extra [???D???] 伤害 from the attack.

commonAbilities.name: Swarm
commonAbilities.desc: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening 大型 enough for a ???. The swarm can't regain 生命值 or gain temporary 生命值.

commonAbilities.name: Teleport (Action or Legendary Action)
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] magically teleports, along with any 装备 it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

commonAbilities.name: T攻城槌pling 冲锋

If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC ??? 力量 豁免 or be knocked 倒地. If the target is 倒地, the [MON] can make another ??? attack against it as a 附赠动作.

commonAbilities.name: Tunneler
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow 速度 and leaves a ???-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

commonAbilities.name: Turn Resistance
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] has 优势 on 豁免 against any effect that turns 亡灵.

commonAbilities.name: Two-Headed
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] has 优势 on 感知 (察觉) checks and on 豁免 against being 目盲, 魅惑, 耳聋, 恐慌, 震慑, and knocked 昏迷.

commonAbilities.name: 不死坚韧
commonAbilities.desc: If 伤害 reduces the [MON] to 0 生命值, it must make a 体质 豁免 with a DC of 5 + the 伤害 taken, unless the 伤害 is 光耀 or from a critical hit. On a success, the [MON] drops to 1 hit point instead.

commonAbilities.name: Water Breathing
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] can breathe only underwater.

commonAbilities.name: Web Sense
commonAbilities.desc: While in contact with a web, the [MON] knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

commonAbilities.name: Web Walker
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

commonAbilities.name: Wing Attack (Legendary Action)
commonAbilities.desc: The [MON] beats its wings. Each creature within ??? ft. of the [MON] must succeed on a DC ??? 敏捷 豁免 or take [STR ???D???] 钝击 伤害 and be knocked 倒地. The [MON] can then fly up to half its flying 速度.
